heading: Omitted
label: 632a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , required Secretary of Health and Human Services to enter into agreements with 7 to 12 States for the purpose of conducting demonstration projects of up to 4 years duration for the training and employment of eligible participants as homemakers or home health aides and required Secretary to submit to Congress annual reports and a final report 6 months after receiving final reports from all States.Pub.
